audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits 4 visitors at $5 per person. Under 18 years admitted free. Tickets are purchased online, and you will need to show the confirmed tickets AND your library pass email/coupon code for entry into the museum. See website for latest hours, holidays and closings.
